drawn.ability: Copy 1 other evolved Pokemon's ability each Day

data.hand: 1 Gentle Touch, 2 Berry Snack, 1 Rattle Toy, 1 Soothing Lullaby
data.reasoning: Strategic analysis: Mime Jr. is 5-icon (Toy 3, Song 1, Medicine 1), high rep but slow. Only 1 Gentle Touch in hand - cannot evolve any 4-icon baby same-turn. Best plan: skip Mime Jr., buy cheap market cards to improve deck for next turn. Poke Ball Rattle (1 token) adds Toy. Save 1 token. Wait for easier baby.

actions.note: No baby to tuck under. Hold cards.

data.note: Strategic P1 PASSES on Mime Jr. (too hard with current hand). Buys Poke Ball Rattle to improve deck. This is a key strategic difference - Random/Greedy would adopt immediately.

data.hand: 1 Rattle Toy, 2 Gentle Touch, 1 Berry Snack, 1 Soothing Lullaby
data.reasoning: Strategic P2: Same assessment - Mime Jr. too expensive for current hand. But P2 has 2 Gentle Touch. Could adopt and start tucking: Rattle Toy (Toy 1) + Gentle Touch (Toy) + Gentle Touch (Toy) = 3 Toy. Still needs Song 1 + Medicine 1. Over 2 turns. But that commits entire hand to Mime Jr. for 2 turns. Alternative: deck build. Strategic choice: adopt Mime Jr. because 6 rep is highest in game and Mr. Mime ability is very strong. Invest 2 turns.
data.note: Strategic P2 makes long-term investment: adopts Mime Jr., commits 3 cards for Toy requirement. Buys Jigglypuff's Melody (2 Song) for future Song coverage. 3/5 icons Day 1.

day2_P1.hand: Gentle Touch x3, Soothing Lullaby, Poke Ball Rattle (reshuffle: 5 cards left in deck after Day 1 discard)
day2_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Happiny in meadow (Berry 2, Song 1, Medicine 1 = 4 icons, rep 5). Hand has 3 Gentle Touch + Soothing Lullaby + Poke Ball Rattle. Can cover: Berry (GT), Berry (GT), Song (Soothing Lullaby), Medicine (GT). YES - same-turn evolve Happiny! And Chansey gives +1 token income - engine building.
day2_P1.actions: Adopt Happiny. Tuck: Gentle Touch (Berry) + Gentle Touch (Berry) + Soothing Lullaby (Song) + Gentle Touch (Medicine). Happiny evolves to Chansey! Rep +5. P1 rep: 5. Chansey gives +1 income. Buy Clefairy Doll (2 tokens, tokensAfter: 1).

day2_P2.hand: Soothing Lullaby, Berry Snack, Jigglypuff's Melody (bought), Gentle Touch x2 (reshuffle smaller deck)
day2_P2.reasoning: Strategic: need Song + Medicine for Mime Jr. Hand has Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) and Jigglypuff's Melody (Song 2). Tuck Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) + Berry Snack (won't help Mime Jr. - needs Medicine not Berry). Tuck Gentle Touch as Medicine.
day2_P2.actions: Tuck Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) + Gentle Touch (Medicine 1) under Mime Jr. Mime Jr. now at Toy 3, Song 1, Medicine 1. EVOLVES to Mr. Mime! Rep +6. P2 rep: 6. Save Jigglypuff's Melody for future. Buy Potion Drops (1 token, tokensAfter: 2).

drawn.ability: Song cards cost 1 less to purchase

day3_P1.hand: Berry Snack x2, Poke Ball Rattle, Gentle Touch, Clefairy Doll (reshuffle)
day3_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Igglybuff in meadow (Berry 2, Toy 1 = 3 icons, easy). Hand: 2 Berry Snack + Poke Ball Rattle = exactly Berry 2 + Toy 1. Same-turn evolve! Chansey income helping.
day3_P1.actions: Adopt Igglybuff. Tuck Berry Snack (Berry) + Berry Snack (Berry) + Poke Ball Rattle (Toy). Igglybuff evolves to Jigglypuff! Rep +3. P1 rep: 8. Jigglypuff ability: Song cards cost 1 less. Strategic: buy Lullaby Chorus (normally 3, now 2 tokens). tokensAfter: 3. Buy Poke Ball Rattle (1 token). tokensAfter: 2.

day3_P2.hand: Jigglypuff's Melody, Potion Drops, Rattle Toy, Gentle Touch, Berry Snack (reshuffle)
day3_P2.reasoning: Strategic P2: Mr. Mime can copy Chansey ability (+1 income). Use that. No easy baby in meadow. Focus deck building. Mr. Mime copies Chansey: +1 income = 5 income this turn. Buy high-value cards: Lum Berry Feast (3 tokens), Herbal Compress (2 tokens). tokensAfter: 1.
day3_P2.actions: Deck building turn. Mr. Mime copies P2's own... wait, Mr. Mime copies other evolved Pokemon abilities. P2 only has Mr. Mime. No ability to copy. Mr. Mime ability is wasted with only 1 evolved. Strategic realization: Mr. Mime needs other evolutions first. Buy Lum Berry Feast (3) + Sitrus Berry (2). tokensAfter: 1.

drawn.ability: Nurture Burst threshold reduced to 2 (all types)

day4_P1.hand: Lullaby Chorus (bought), Gentle Touch, Soothing Lullaby, Clefairy Doll, Poke Ball Rattle (bought)
day4_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Riolu in meadow (Song 2, Medicine 1, Toy 1 = 4 icons, rep 5). Hand: Lullaby Chorus (3 Song!) + Soothing Lullaby (Song) = overkill Song. Poke Ball Rattle (Toy). Gentle Touch (Medicine). Can evolve same-turn! But Lullaby Chorus provides 3 Song when only 2 needed - waste 1 icon. Strategic weighs: evolve now or save Lullaby Chorus for harder baby. Decision: evolve now, Riolu gives Lucario (burst threshold 2 all types = very powerful).
day4_P1.actions: Adopt Riolu. Tuck: Soothing Lullaby (Song 1) + Gentle Touch (Song... wait, need Medicine). Rethink: Riolu needs Song 2, Medicine 1, Toy 1. Tuck Lullaby Chorus (Song 3, only 2 counted) + Gentle Touch (Medicine) + Poke Ball Rattle (Toy). Riolu evolves to Lucario! Rep +5. P1 rep: 13. Buy Berry Garden facility (2 tokens). tokensAfter: 5.

day4_P2.hand: Lum Berry Feast, Sitrus Berry, Jigglypuff's Melody, Soothing Lullaby, Gentle Touch
day4_P2.reasoning: Strategic P2: Riolu taken by P1. P2 needs to adopt. Mr. Mime still only evolved Pokemon. Focus: get a baby that will evolve quickly.
day4_P2.actions: No baby in meadow (P1 took Riolu). Strategic: heavy deck building. Buy Healing Pulse (3 tokens). Buy Potion Drops (1 token). tokensAfter: 1. Building Medicine reserves for future.

drawn.ability: Once/Day: 1 Care Token = 1 Wild care icon

day5_P1.hand: Berry Snack, Clefairy Doll, Herbal Compress, Gentle Touch x2, Soothing Lullaby (Melody Room if bought... P1 doesn't have Melody Room. 5 cards.)
day5_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Azurill in meadow (Toy 2, Berry 1 = 3 icons). Clefairy Doll (2 Toy) + Berry Snack (Berry). Same-turn evolve! Lucario burst threshold helps future plays.
day5_P1.actions: Adopt Azurill. Tuck Clefairy Doll (Toy 2, Lucario burst at 2: bonus icon!) + Berry Snack (Berry 1). Azurill evolves to Marill! Rep +3. P1 rep: 16. Buy Melody Room facility (2 tokens). Buy Crib Expansion (3 tokens). tokensAfter: 3.

day5_P2.hand: Healing Pulse, Potion Drops, Berry Snack, Rattle Toy, Gentle Touch
day5_P2.reasoning: Strategic P2: Azurill taken. P2 desperate for baby. No meadow. Focus on buying and waiting.
day5_P2.actions: Buy Substitute Plush (3 tokens). Buy Hummed Tune (1 token). tokensAfter: 1. Still only 1 evolution (Mr. Mime).

day6_P1.hand: Gentle Touch x2, Poke Ball Rattle, Soothing Lullaby, Potion Drops, Lullaby Chorus (6 cards: Melody Room)
day6_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Smoochum in meadow (Medicine 2, Song 1 = 3 icons). Potion Drops (Medicine 1) + Gentle Touch (Medicine) + Soothing Lullaby (Song). Same-turn evolve!
day6_P1.actions: Adopt Smoochum. Tuck Potion Drops (Medicine) + Gentle Touch (Medicine) + Soothing Lullaby (Song). Smoochum evolves to Jynx! Rep +3. P1 rep: 19. Buy Toy Workshop (3 tokens). tokensAfter: 5.

day6_P2.hand: Substitute Plush, Hummed Tune, Jigglypuff's Melody, Sitrus Berry, Lum Berry Feast
day6_P2.reasoning: Strategic P2: Finally no P1 to snipe meadow baby first (P1 already adopted). Mr. Mime can now copy Jynx ability (treat Song as Medicine). P2 has strong Song cards. But no baby in meadow again - P1 took Smoochum. Need to wait.
day6_P2.actions: Buy Clefairy Doll (2 tokens). Buy Poke Ball Rattle (1 token). tokensAfter: 2. Still stuck at 1 evolution.
day6_P2.note: P2 severely hampered by always being second to adopt. Meadow bottleneck is a major P2 disadvantage.

drawn.ability: Draw 1 extra card during Supply Phase

day7_P1.hand: Berry Snack, Clefairy Doll, Herbal Compress, Gentle Touch, Sitrus Berry, Poke Ball Rattle (6 cards Melody Room)
day7_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Pichu in meadow (Toy 2, Song 1 = 3 icons, rep 4, Pikachu gives +1 draw). Clefairy Doll (2 Toy) + Soothing Lullaby... not in hand. Gentle Touch (Song). Same-turn evolve.
day7_P1.actions: Adopt Pichu. Tuck Clefairy Doll (Toy 2) + Gentle Touch (Song). Pichu evolves to Pikachu! Rep +4. P1 rep: 23. Buy Blossom Greenhouse (4 tokens). tokensAfter: 4.

day7_P2.hand: Healing Pulse, Potion Drops, Poke Ball Rattle (bought), Clefairy Doll (bought), Gentle Touch
day7_P2.reasoning: Strategic P2: Pichu taken by P1 again. 7/8 evolutions, P2 has only 1. P2 knows next evolution triggers endgame. Must adopt and evolve ASAP.
day7_P2.actions: No meadow baby. Again. Buy Full Restore (2 tokens). Buy Oran Berry (1 token). tokensAfter: 3. P2 building massive unused deck.
day7_P2.note: P2 has bought ~10 market cards but evolved only 1 Pokemon. Deck is bloated with good cards and no babies to use them on.

drawn.ability: Nurture Burst threshold reduced to 2 for Medicine

day8_P1.hand: Lullaby Chorus, Soothing Lullaby, Poke Ball Rattle, Berry Snack, Potion Drops, Herbal Compress (6 cards)
day8_P1.reasoning: Strategic: Tyrogue in meadow (Medicine 2, Toy 1, Berry 1 = 4 icons). Potion Drops (Medicine) + Herbal Compress (Medicine+Berry) + Poke Ball Rattle (Toy). That's Medicine 2, Berry 1, Toy 1. Same-turn evolve!
day8_P1.actions: Adopt Tyrogue. Tuck Potion Drops (Medicine) + Herbal Compress (Medicine + Berry, draw 1) + Poke Ball Rattle (Toy). Tyrogue evolves to Hitmonchan! Rep +4. P1 rep: 27. ENDGAME TRIGGER: 8th evolution!

day8_P2.hand: Substitute Plush, Hummed Tune, Jigglypuff's Melody, Lum Berry Feast, Full Restore
day8_P2.reasoning: Endgame triggered. P2 finally gets a turn. No meadow baby. P2 buys what they can. Desperate.
day8_P2.actions: Buy Musical Mobile (2 tokens). Buy Oran Berry (1 token). tokensAfter: 4. Still 1 evolution.

finalWeek_day9_P1.hand: Sitrus Berry, Gentle Touch x2, Clefairy Doll, Berry Snack, Substitute Plush (6 cards)
finalWeek_day9_P1.actions: Adopt Togepi from meadow (if available). Draw new baby.

finalWeek_day9_P2.reasoning: Strategic P2 must evolve something NOW. If a baby appears in meadow after P1's turn, P2 can adopt.

drawn.ability: Once/Day: peek at top 2 deck cards, keep 1

day9_P1.hand: Sitrus Berry, Gentle Touch x2, Clefairy Doll, Berry Snack, Substitute Plush (6 cards)
day9_P1.actions: Adopt Cleffa (Song 2, Medicine 1). Tuck Gentle Touch (Song) + Gentle Touch (Song) + ... wait, need Medicine. Only Gentle Touch x2 for Song. Need 1 Medicine. No Medicine card in hand! Strategic: use Jynx ability (treat 1 Song as Medicine). Tuck Soothing Lullaby... not in hand. Actually: P1 hand doesn't have good Song/Medicine coverage. Cannot same-turn evolve Cleffa. Tuck Gentle Touch (Song) + Gentle Touch (Song). Cleffa at 2/3 (Song 2, Medicine 0). Buy Potion Drops from market. Next turn finish.

day9_P2.hand: Healing Pulse, Potion Drops, Oran Berry, Poke Ball Rattle, Clefairy Doll
day9_P2.actions: No meadow baby (P1 took Cleffa). ANOTHER adoption-blocked turn. P2 buys more cards. tokensAfter: 3. Still 1 evolution total.

day10_P1.hand: Potion Drops (bought), Herbal Compress, Lullaby Chorus, Poke Ball Rattle, Berry Snack, Soothing Lullaby (6 cards)
day10_P1.actions: Tuck Potion Drops (Medicine 1) under Cleffa. Cleffa evolves to Clefairy! Rep +3. P1 rep: 30. Final score calculation.

day10_P2.hand: Substitute Plush, Hummed Tune, Jigglypuff's Melody, Full Restore, Gentle Touch
day10_P2.actions: New meadow baby drawn. P2 adopts Budew (Berry 2, Song 1 = 3 icons). Tuck Gentle Touch (Berry) + Hummed Tune (Song). Needs 1 more Berry. Cannot evolve. P2 ends at 1 evolution.

finalScoring.note: Massive P1 blowout. P2 had 1 evolution in 10 Days. Meadow bottleneck crushed P2.
